creator: sos@freebsd.dk
text:

> xavier# dmesg | grep ata
> atapci0: <Intel PIIX3 ATA controller> port 0x1000-0x100f at device 7.1 on pci0
> ata0: at 0x1f0 irq 14 on atapci0
> ata1: at 0x170 irq 15 on atapci0
> ad0: 1549MB <ST31722A> [3148/16/63] at ata0-master using WDMA2
> ad1: 12971MB <WDC WD136AA> [26354/16/63] at ata0-slave using WDMA2
> acd0: CD-RW <ZIPCD1024INT-A> at ata1-master using PIO4
> acd1: CDROM <GCD-R580B> at ata1-slave using PIO3
> 
> >Description:
> 
> 	burncd works for creating a disk, yet...
> 
> xavier# burncd blank
> blanking CD, please wait..
> burncd: ioctl(CDRIOCBLANK): Device busy

Are you sure that the CD wasn't mounted ??

-Søren
